stemHtml: Which of the following correctly describes an en-route alternate aerodrome?

options.a: An aerodrome identified as a diversion option only for medical emergencies.
options.b: An aerodrome used for refuelling on long-haul flights.
options.c: An aerodrome located at the midpoint of the planned route.
options.d: An aerodrome designated in the flight plan to which a flight may proceed in the event of an emergency en-route.
